reviews.comment:
Sólo fui a averiguar los precios para hacer uso de las instalaciones, al menos para mi, me resultó precio alto para las pocas contraprestaciones!!!
Reitero es mi percepción

(Translated by Google)
I only went to inquire about the prices for using the facilities, and at least for me, it seemed expensive for the limited services offered!
I reiterate, this is just my opinion.

reviews.comment:
Los baños limpios. No había señal x lo q no pude mostrar mi credencial de socia y no m hicieron el descuento en el.precio de la nafta. Mal

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were clean. There was no sign, so I couldn't show my membership card, and they wouldn't give me a discount on the gas price. Bad.

reviews.comment:
Parada obligatoria luego de pasar el peaje...combustible,baños, verde  y sombra para disfrutar mediante mate.  Y luego seguir viaje..la gente del lugar más q cordial..

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop after the tollbooth...fuel, restrooms, greenery and shade to enjoy with some mate. And then continue your journey...the locals are incredibly friendly.
